La promotion de la chirurgie esthétique auprès des mineurs peut entraîner des taux plus élevés d'insatisfaction corporelle. Par conséquent, ce type de contenu, y compris les vidéos avant-après, les vidéos d'interventions chirurgicales et les messages discutant d'une chirurgie esthétique facultative sans avertissement sur les risques, n'est pas éligible pour le fil Pour toi de tous les utilisateurs de moins de 18 ans.","vid_mod_analytics_penalty_reason_unoriginal_title":"Contenu non original, de mauvaise qualité et contenant des codes QR","vid_mod_analytics_penalty_reason_unoriginal_desc":"Pour que l'application TikTok reste positive et agréable pour nos utilisateurs, le contenu non original ou de mauvaise qualité ne peut pas être recommandé. Le contenu non original comprend les vidéos qui sont simplement importées ou téléversées à partir d'autres sources (comme d'autres plateformes, des émissions TV, des films ou des webcasts) sans aucune modification nouvelle et créative. Nous pouvons savoir si une vidéo n'est pas originale si elle comporte un filigrane ou un logo superposé. Le contenu de faible qualité comprend les vidéos très courtes, les images statiques et les vidéos composées uniquement de GIF. Le contenu avec des codes QR est généralement inéligible pour le fil Pour toi, car il peut conduire les utilisateurs vers des sites Web ou des applications nuisibles, même si nous faisons des exceptions dans des circonstances où le risque est faible (par exemple, pour l'e-commerce).","vid_mod_analytics_nr_vid_penalty_reason_unoriginal_title":"Contenu non original, de mauvaise qualité et contenant des codes QR","vid_mod_analytics_nr_vid_penalty_reason_unoriginal_desc":"Pour maintenir l'expérience positive que nos utilisateurs attendent de la plateforme TikTok, le contenu non original et de faible qualité ne peut pas être recommandé. Le contenu non original est un contenu qui est simplement importé ou copié à partir d'autres sources sans aucune nouvelle modification créative. Une vidéo peut être non originale si elle comporte un filigrane ou un logo. Le contenu de faible qualité comprend les vidéos très courtes, les images statiques et les vidéos composées uniquement de GIF.","vid_mod_analytics_nr_acct_penalty_reason_unoriginal_title":"Compte reproduit","vid_mod_analytics_nr_acct_penalty_reason_unoriginal_desc":"Ton compte contient des publications qui ne sont pas originales et donc inéligibles au fil d'actualité Pour toi. Pour en savoir plus, consulte nos Consignes communautaires \u003E Inéligible au fil d'actualité Pour toi \u003E Contenu non original, de mauvaise qualité et contenant des codes QR","vid_mod_analytics_penalty_reason_spam_title":"Contenu indésirable, non authentique ou trompeur","vid_mod_analytics_penalty_reason_spam_desc":"Le contenu qui tente de tromper ou de manipuler les utilisateurs pour obtenir plus de followers, de j'aime, de vues ou d'autres formes d'engagement sur la plateforme n'est pas éligible pour le fil Pour toi. Cela inclut le contenu qui encourage les utilisateurs à se suivre ou à s'aimer mutuellement, ou le contenu qui incite les utilisateurs à cliquer sur les boutons J'aime ou Partager. En outre, le contenu qui encourage les théories du complot et diffuse des informations fausses ou préjudiciables sur les événements actuels et sur des événements sur lesquels toute la lumière n'est pas encore faite n'est pas éligible au fil d'actualité Pour toi.","vid_mod_analytics_penalty_reason_sexual_title":"Contenu ouvertement sexualisé","vid_mod_analytics_penalty_reason_sexual_desc":"Pour contribuer à maintenir une expérience confortable, le contenu ouvertement suggestif sur le plan sexuel ne peut pas être recommandé. Il s'agit notamment du contenu qui montre une nudité implicite, qui sexualise des parties du corps ou qui est ouvertement érotique ou sensuel (par exemple, les strip-teases).","vid_mod_analytics_penalty_reason_tobacco_title":"Produits du tabac et de l'alcool","vid_mod_analytics_penalty_reason_tobacco_desc":"Le contenu promouvant, mentionnant ou décrivant des produits alcoolisés consommés par des personnes ayant l'âge légal de boire, mais le faisant de manière dangereuse, peut ne pas être éligible pour une recommandation. Le contenu décrivant l'utilisation de produits du tabac par des adultes ou mentionnant des substances contrôlées ne peut pas être recommandé.","vid_mod_analytics_penalty_reason_stunts_title":"Cascades et sports dangereux","vid_mod_analytics_penalty_reason_stunts_desc":"Lorsqu'elles sont reproduites sans précautions de sécurité, certaines activités peuvent être risquées ou dangereuses, ce qui pourrait entraîner des dommages physiques. Le contenu qui inclut des cascades dangereuses ou des sports extrêmes réalisés par des non-professionnels peut être inéligible.","vid_mod_analytics_penalty_reason_graphic_title":"Contenu violent et explicite","vid_mod_analytics_penalty_reason_graphic_desc":"Les contenus susceptibles de mette les spectateurs mal à l'aise, de les choquer ou de les dégoûter peut être inéligible pour le fil d'actualité Pour toi. Cela comprend notamment les effets d'épouvante, les « jump scares », les maquillages qui recréent de façon réaliste des blessures gores et les représentations de fonctions corporelles. La plupart des contenus violents et explicites ne sont pas autorisés sur TikTok. Cependant, nous pouvons autoriser certains types de contenus comme les représentations explicites de décès, d'accidents ou de bagarres s'ils servent à informer le public d'événements réels et sont considérés comme étant dans l'intérêt du public. Étant donné que ce contenu n'est pas adapté à tous les publics, il ne pourra pas être recommandé et il sera accompagné d'un écran ou d'un avertissement de type « Accepter ».","vid_mod_analytics_penalty_reason_fyf_title":"Inéligible au fil d'actualité Pour toi","vid_mod_analytics_penalty_reason_fyf_desc":"Ta vidéo ne respecte pas nos critères d'éligibilité au fil d'actualité Pour toi. Pour en savoir plus, consulte les Consignes communautaires TikTok \u003E Inéligible au fil d'actualité Pour toi","vidModAnalytics_detailPg_sectionHumanMod_sectionBody":"Les utilisateurs et les tiers peuvent nous signaler des infractions de politique. title: Discover and build Wikimedia technology - Wikimedia Developer Portal
content: Skip to content Discover and build Wikimedia technology Find technical documentation, and connect with the developer community behind Wikipedia and other Wikimedia projects . Get started Use Wikimedia content and data Access articles from Wikipedia, media files, structured data, and more with public APIs and downloads. Build tools and bots Tools and bots make it easier to edit and maintain Wikimedia projects. Contribute to Wikimedia open source Help build the Wikimedia ecosystem with open source software. Connect with the community Get involved with the Wikimedia technical community, and find opportunities for support and learning. null || pricing === undefined) { this.console('Not found Pricing'); } pricing.recipeExtId = window.mrtnRecipe.id; pricing.serves = 4; } initCTA() { this.console('Init CTA'); if (window.mrtnRecipe === undefined) { this.console('Recipe not defined'); return; } this.console(window.mrtnRecipe); const cardCta = document.querySelector("webc-miam-recipe-card-cta"); if (cardCta === null) { this.console('Not found CTA'); return; } //cardCta.recipeName = window.mrtnRecipe.title; cardCta.recipeExtId = window.mrtnRecipe.id.toString(); cardCta.serves = "4"; const inputIngredient = document.querySelector(".recipe-ingredients__qt-counter__value"); if (inputIngredient) { cardCta.serves = inputIngredient.value.toString(); const pricing = document.querySelector("webc-miam-recipe-pricing"); if (pricing === null || pricing === undefined) { this.console('Not found Pricing'); } pricing.serves = inputIngredient.value.toString(); } document.addEventListener('updateCounterIngredients', (event) => { this.updateCounterCTA(event); }) } updateCounterCTA(event) { const cardCta = document.querySelector("webc-miam-recipe-card-cta"); if (cardCta === null) { this.console('Not found CTA'); } cardCta.serves = event.detail.toString(); const pricing = document.querySelector("webc-miam-recipe-pricing"); if (pricing === null || pricing === undefined) { this.console('Not found Pricing'); } pricing.serves = event.detail.toString(); } initBasket() { const basketButton = document.querySelector('.mrtn-button-mealz-basket'); if (!basketButton) { return; } basketButton.addEventListener('click', () => window.miam.basket.openPreview()); this.refreshBasketNumber(); } storeSubscribe() { console.log('Init store subscribe'); window.miam.events.storeLocatorOpened().subscribe({ next: opened => { console.log('mealz store opened', opened); if (opened) { if (this.userLocation === null) { this.initLocationUser() } else { this.sendPositionToMealz() } } }, }); } initLocationUser() { navigator.permissions.query({ name: "geolocation" }).then((result) => { if (result.state === "granted") { window.miam.user.setLocation(location) } else if (result.state === "prompt") { navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(this.registerLocationAndSend); } else if (result.state === 'denied') { this.registerLocationAndSend(undefined); } result.addEventListener("change", () => { if (this.userLocation !== null && this.userLocation !== undefined) { this.sendPositionToMealz() } }); }); } registerLocationAndSend(value) { console.log('Mealz register location and send', value); this.userLocation = value; this.sendPositionToMealz(); } sendPositionToMealz() { if (this.userLocation === null) { return; } console.log('Mealz location user send', this.userLocation); window.miam.user.setLocation(this.userLocation); } refreshBasketNumber() { window.miam.basket.recipeCount().subscribe({ next: value => { const spanNumber = document.querySelector('.mrtn-button-mealz-basket .number'); if (!spanNumber) { return; } if (value > 0) { spanNumber.style.display = 'block'; spanNumber.innerText = value; } else { spanNumber.style.display = 'none'; } }, complete: () => { console.log('recipeCount ok'); } }); } displayLog() { return this.logConstructor; } console(textOrObject) { if (typeof textOrObject === 'string') { console.log('Mealz : ' + textOrObject); } else { console.log('Mealz : ', textOrObject); } } } function setupMealz() { if (window.miam !== undefined) { if (MealzManage === Le 16/09/2022 à 12:00 , modifié le 16/09/2022 à 12:00 © Claudia Totir/ Moment/ GettyImages La suite après cette publicité Utilisez vos croissants de la veille avec nos idées de recettes anti-gaspi, pour se faire plaisir sans en jeter une miette ! Ces recettes gourmandes sont simples à réaliser et rapides ! Salé ou sucré, vous allez redécouvrir vos croissants de la veille revisités sous toutes leurs coutures ! Sommaire Réchauffer son croissant On réalise des croissants perdus On fait des sandwishs On en fait un toast On a les yeux plus gros que le ventre et il nous reste des croissants sur les bras ! Le premier geste qui nous vient en tête est de s'en débarrasser. Grave erreur ! Il y a plusieurs recettes super simples pour utiliser vos croissants de la veille et qui vont vous régaler ! On se fait plaisir, sans gaspiller. 😋 En version salée pour un brunch ou un déjeuner, le croissant s'utilise parfaitement comme un sandwich. Son plus ? Il est tendre et son goût légèrement beurré apporte beaucoup de gourmandise . Amoureux du pain perdu ? Utilisez la même préparation, mais au lieu du pain ou d'un reste de brioche, utilisez vos croissants, délice garanti ! 🥐 Enfin, c'est pour remplacer vos toasts que les croissants de la veille son délicieux. Passez-les au grille-pain et tartinez-les de ce qu'il vous fait envie ! Découvrez toutes nos idées de recettes anti-gaspi pour utiliser vos croissants de la veille. La suite après cette publicité Réchauffer son croissant Si vous avez bien conservé vos viennoiseries dans une boite hermétique, il est possible de simplement les réchauffer. Avant de préparer vos sandwichs ou uniquement pour les manger tel quel, vous pouvez réchauffer vos croissants. Pour ce faire, mettez-les au four pendant 5 minutes à 160 °C. On réalise des croissants perdus Comme le pain ou la brioche, les croissants perdus permettent d'utiliser ses viennoiseries rassies. Préparez un appareil à pain perdu et trempez-y vos croissants. C'est une super idée pour un brunch, un goûter ou simplement à l'heure du petit déjeuner. Македонски : Википедија е повеќејазичен енциклопедиски интернет-проект со слободна содржина. Українська : Вікіпедія — відкрита багатомовна вікі-енциклопедія. 한국어 : 위키백과 는 여러 언어로 쓰여진, 웹 기반 무료 백과사전 프로젝트입니다. 日本語 ： ウィキペディア は多言語で展開されている、フリーコンテントのオンライン百科事典プロジェクトです。 中文（简体） ： 维基百科 是一个多语言，在网络上自由的百科全书计划。 中文（繁體） ： 維基百科 是一個多語言，在網絡上自由的百科全書計劃。 文言 ： 維基大典 者，網路為礎；集天下知、四海言、眾人志，書百科焉。始作者，維基媒體基金會也。 فارسی : ویکی‌پدیا یک دانشنامه اینترنتی چندزبانه با محتویات آزاد است. title: Category:Copyright by Wikimedia - Wikimedia Commons
content: Help Category : Copyright by Wikimedia From Wikimedia Commons, the free media repository Jump to navigation Jump to search This category contains images copyrighted by the Wikimedia Foundation . However, copyfraud is common - also within Wikimedia. See Commons:Village_pump/Archive/2011/04#Relicense_of_Wikimedia_logos . Some very simple logos may be not eligible for copyright but being tagged as if. We invite you to reflect on the number of times you visited Wikipedia in the last year. If the knowledge you gained here was valuable, please join the 2% of readers who donate. Any amount helps: €5, €20, €50 , or whatever feels right to you today. In the age of AI, access to verifiable facts is crucial. Wikipedia is at the heart of online information, powering everything from your personal searches to emerging AI technologies. Your gift strengthens the knowledge of today and tomorrow. If Wikipedia has given you useful knowledge this year, please give back. There are no small contributions: every edit counts, every donation counts. Thank you. } .mw-jump-link { display: none !important; } /* Re-add gradient background */ body { background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, #fff 40px, #f6f6f6 80px); background-position: top; background-repeat: repeat-x; background-color: #f6f6f6; } #content { background-color: transparent; background-image: none; border: 0; padding-top: 32px; } /* Link colors for visibility */ .mw-parser-output a, .mw-parser-output a.external, .mw-parser-output a.extiw { color: #36c; } .mw-parser-output a:visited, .mw-parser-output a.external:visited, .mw-parser-output a.extiw:visited { color: #6f4db3; } .lp-error { color: #d73333; font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; } /* Prevent site logos from showing through modals (e.g. for monthly convert) */ .vector-body { position: inherit; } body.modal-open { overflow: hidden; position: fixed; } /* --- Overall layout of the landing page --- */ #main-wrapper { width: 100%; display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center; gap: 24px; } body.rtl #main-wrapper { direction: rtl; } #form-wrapper { width: 380px; background-color: #fff; border: 1px solid #a2a9b1; border-radius: 2px; padding: 24px; color: #222; } #appeal-wrapper { flex: 1 0 0; } /* --- Appeal --- */ #appeal { font-size: 16px; } #appeal .mw-heading2, #appeal-head { font-size: 21px; padding-bottom: 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid #a2a9b1; margin-bottom: 21px; } .quote-wrapper { padding: 140px 0; } /* --- Hide non-recurring capable payment methods on recurring forms --- */ .form-monthly .not-monthly-capable, form[data-frequency="monthly"] .not-monthly-capable, form[data-frequency="annual"] .not-monthly-capable { display: none; } /* --- Form --- */ #donate-form-wrapper fieldset { width: 100%; border: 0; margin: 0 0 8px 0; padding: 0; } .frequency-options ul, .amount-options ul { display: grid; margin: 0; padding: 0; list-style: none; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px; } .frequency-options ul { grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(0, 1fr)); } .amount-options ul { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr; } .frequency-options ul li, .amount-options ul li { padding: 0; } /* --- Subheaders --- */ #radiobuttons-table-header, #paymenttype-table-header { display: block; margin-bottom: 6px; text-align: center; font-weight: bold; } /* --- Commmon button styles --- */ .frequency-options input[type="radio"], .amount-options input[type="radio"] { position: absolute; width: 1px; height: 1px; margin: -1px; padding: 0; overflow: hidden; border: 0; clip: rect(0 0 0 0); } .frb-btn, .payment-method-button { display: flex; justify-content: center; align-content: center; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; text-align: center; height: 50px; padding: 0 2px; border-radius: 2px; font-family: inherit; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.2; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 100ms, color 100ms, border-color 100ms, box-shadow 100ms; background-color: #f8f9fa; color: #222; border: 1px solid #a2a9b1; } .frb-btn:hover { background-color: #fff; color: #444; border-color: #a2a9b1; } .frb-btn:active { background-color: #c8ccd1; color: #000; border-color: #72777d; box-shadow: none; } input[type="radio"]:checked + .frb-btn { background-color: #2a4b8d; color: #fff; border-color: #2a4b8d; } .frb-btn:focus, .payment-method-button:focus { outline: 0; border-color: #36c; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px #36c; } input[type="radio"]:focus + .frb-btn, input[type="radio"]:checked + .frb-btn:focus { box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px #36c, inset 0 0 0 2px #fff; } .payment-method-button { color: #36c; } .payment-method-button:hover { background-color: #fff; border-color: #447ff5; } .payment-method-button:active { background-color: #eff3fa; color: #2a4b8d; border-color: #2a4b8d; box-shadow: none; } /* --- Donation Amounts --- */ .amount-options .frb-btn { height: 60px; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.2; text-align: center; } /* Smaller font size for countries with v long amounts */ .country-CO .amount-options .frb-btn, .country-CR .amount-options .frb-btn, .country-KR .amount-options .frb-btn, .country-PY .amount-options .frb-btn, .country-VN .amount-options .frb-btn { font-size: 13px; } .input_amount_other .frb-btn span { display: block; font-size: 12px; line-height: 1; margin-bottom: 2px; white-space: normal; text-align: center; } .input_amount_other input { display: block; width: 100%; border: 1px solid #a2a9b1; color: #222; padding: 2px; border-radius: 2px; direction: ltr; text-align: center; font-family: inherit; font-size: 16px; /* must be >=16px or mobile Safari zooms in when selected */ -webkit-appearance: none; -moz-appearance: none; appearance: none; margin: 0 4px; } /* --- Opt-in and PTF input styles --- */ .lp-radio-wrapper, .lp-checkbox-wrapper { display: table; } .lp-radio, .lp-checkbox { display: table-cell; vertical-align: top; margin: 7px 8px 8px 2px; cursor: pointer; } body.rtl .lp-radio, body.rtl .lp-checkbox { margin: 7px 2px 8px 8px; } .lp-radio-label, .lp-checkbox-label { display: table-cell; vertical-align: top; padding: 4px 0; white-space: normal; font-size: 14px; line-height: 18px; font-weight: normal; cursor: pointer; } .lp-radio-label:hover, .lp-radio:focus + .lp-radio-label, .lp-radio:hover + .lp-radio-label, .lp-checkbox-label:hover, .lp-checkbox:focus + .lp-checkbox-label, .lp-checkbox:hover + .lp-checkbox-label { color: #36c; text-decoration: none; } /* --- Opt-in --- */ .optin-options legend { padding: 0; font-size: inherit; font-weight: bold; } .optin-options ul { list-style: none; margin: 0; } .optin-options li { display: table; } .optin-smallprint { clear: both; font-size: 12px; line-height: 14px; margin-top: 8px; } .optin-no-prompt { display: none; margin: 0; padding: 6px; border: 2px solid #900; border-radius: 2px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 18px; font-weight: normal; } .optin-no-prompt.is-positive { border-color: #14866d; font-weight: bold; } .optin-no-prompt__yes { display: none; } .optin-no-prompt__no { display: block; } .optin-no-prompt.is-positive .optin-no-prompt__yes { display: block; } .optin-no-prompt.is-positive .optin-no-prompt__no { display: none; } /* --- PTF --- */ .ptf { display: none; } /* --- Payment method buttons --- */ .payment-method-div { padding: 4px 0; } /* Hide extra empty

tags between buttons */ .payment-method-div ~ p { display: none; } .payment-method-button { margin: 0; width: 100%; font-size: 16px; -webkit-appearance: none; -moz-appearance: none; appearance: none; overflow: hidden; } /* --- Infobox ("Where your donation goes") --- */ #infobox-wrapper { font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.4; color: #54595d; font-weight: normal; margin-top: 8px } #infobox-wrapper .mw-heading2 { font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; color: inherit; border: 0; margin-bottom: 8px; } /* --- Privacy and links --- */ #donate-footer { width: 100%; max-width: 948px; margin: 24px auto; text-align: left; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.4; color: #54595d; } #donate-footer > div { margin-bottom: 1em; } .form-info-links, .form-info-links ul { list-style: none; margin: 0; text-align: center; font-size: 15px; } .form-info-links li { display: inline-block; } .form-info-links a.external { padding: 14px !important; } /* --- Footer --- */ .mw-footer { display: none; } .payment-method-button svg { margin: 0 4px; } /* Credit card logos. * Classes are added by https://donate.wikimedia.org/wiki/MediaWiki:DonationForm.js --- */ .paymentmethod-cc svg { display: none; height: 26px; border: 1px solid #c8ccd1; border-radius: 4px; } .cctypes-vmad, .cctypes-vmaj, .cctypes-vmj, .cctypes-vma, .cctypes-vm, .cctypes-CBvma, .cctypes-vmar { font-size: 0; /* Remove spacing between icons */ } .cctypes-vmad .cc-logo-visa, .cctypes-vmad .cc-logo-mastercard, .cctypes-vmad .cc-logo-amex, .cctypes-vmad .cc-logo-discover, .cctypes-vmaj .cc-logo-visa, .cctypes-vmaj .cc-logo-mastercard, .cctypes-vmaj .cc-logo-amex, .cctypes-vmaj .cc-logo-jcb, .cctypes-vmj .cc-logo-visa, .cctypes-vmj .cc-logo-mastercard, .cctypes-vmj .cc-logo-jcb, .cctypes-vma .cc-logo-visa, .cctypes-vma .cc-logo-mastercard, .cctypes-vma .cc-logo-amex, .cctypes-vm .cc-logo-visa, .cctypes-vm .cc-logo-mastercard, .cctypes-CBvma .cc-logo-CB, .cctypes-CBvma .cc-logo-visa, .cctypes-CBvma .cc-logo-mastercard, .cctypes-CBvma .cc-logo-amex, .cctypes-vmar .cc-logo-visa, .cctypes-vmar .cc-logo-mastercard, .cctypes-vmar .cc-logo-amex, .cctypes-vmar .cc-logo-rupay { display: inline-block !important; } .paymentmethod-cc .cc-logo-rupay { border: 0; } /* Logos - WP on top, WMF horizontal below */ #p-logo a { /* Need explicit height for backgrounds for IE */ background: top 30% center/160px 24px url(https://donate.wikimedia.org/static/images/mobile/copyright/wikipedia-wordmark-en.svg), top 70% center/160px 37px url(https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/donate/6/60/Wmf_logo_horiz_K.svg); background-repeat: no-repeat; margin-left: 8px; } /* Mobile styles */ @media (max-width: 981px) { /* Text & Logo layout */ #content { margin: 0; padding: 140px 24px 24px 24px; } #mw-panel, #p-logo, #p-logo a { width: 100% !important; height: 140px; margin: 0; } #p-logo a { margin-left: 0; } /* Hide appeal */ #appeal-wrapper { display: none; } #form-wrapper { padding: 16px; } /* Footer */ div#footer { margin: 0; } } @media (max-width: 721px) { /* Stack appeal and form */ #appeal-wrapper { flex-basis: 100%; padding: 0; } } @media (max-width: 501px) { /* Appeal same width as form */ #appeal-wrapper { max-width: 380px; padding: 0; } #content { padding: 140px 8px 8px 8px; } #donate-footer { max-width: 380px; } } #country-confirm { text-align: center; margin-top: -12px; padding: 4px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #a2a9b1; margin-bottom: 8px; font-size: 90%; } @media (min-width: 980px) { #country-confirm { margin-top: -18px; title: Make your donation now - Wikimedia Foundation
content:
Make your donation now Jump to navigation Jump to search Wikipedia still can't be sold. Thank you for considering a donation to the Wikimedia Foundation. We invite you to reflect on the number of times you visited Wikipedia in the last year. If the knowledge you gained here was valuable, please join the 2% of readers who donate. Any amount helps: €5, €20, €50 , or whatever feels right to you today. In the age of AI, access to verifiable facts is crucial. Wikipedia is at the heart of online information, powering everything from your personal searches to emerging AI technologies. Your gift strengthens the knowledge of today and tomorrow. If Wikipedia has given you useful knowledge this year, please give back. There are no small contributions: every edit counts, every donation counts. Thank you. It appears that you do not have JavaScript enabled, or your browser does not support it. In order to provide a safe, secure and pleasant experience, our donation form requires JavaScript. #actual-form-loading { display: none; } Loading… (If the form does not load, your web browser may not be supported. Please try a different browser.) France change label[for="country-select"] { display: block; } #country-select-link { display: none; } #country-select { max-width: 250px; padding: 1px; } Change country Select a country - Afghanistan Democratic Republic Latvia Lebanon Lesotho Liberia Libyan Arab Jamahiriya Liechtenstein Lithuania Luxembourg Macao Macedonia, the Former Yugoslav Republic of Madagascar Malawi Malaysia Maldives Mali Malta Marshall Islands Martinique Mauritania Mauritius Mayotte Mexico Micronesia, Federated States of Moldova, Republic of Monaco Mongolia Montenegro Montserrat Morocco Mozambique Myanmar Namibia Nauru Nepal Netherlands Netherlands Antilles New Caledonia New Zealand Nicaragua Niger Nigeria Niue Norfolk Island Northern Mariana Islands Norway Oman Pakistan Palau Palestinian Territory, Occupied Panama Papua New Guinea Paraguay Peru Philippines Pitcairn Poland Portugal Puerto Rico Qatar Reunion Romania Russian Federation Rwanda Saint Barthelemy Saint Helena Saint Kitts and Nevis Saint Lucia Saint Martin Saint Pierre and Miquelon Saint Vincent and the Grenadines Samoa San Marino Sao Tome and Principe Saudi Arabia Senegal Serbia Serbia and Montenegro Seychelles Sierra Leone Singapore Sint Maarten Slovakia Slovenia Solomon Islands Somalia South Africa South Georgia and the South Sandwich Islands South Sudan Spain Sri Lanka Sudan Suriname Svalbard and Jan Mayen Swaziland Sweden Switzerland Syrian Arab Republic Taiwan Tajikistan Tanzania, United Republic of Thailand Timor-Leste Togo Tokelau Tonga Trinidad and Tobago Tunisia Turkey Turkmenistan Turks and Caicos Islands Tuvalu Uganda Ukraine United Arab Emirates United Kingdom United States United States Minor Outlying Islands Uruguay Uzbekistan Vanuatu Venezuela Viet Nam Virgin Islands, British Virgin Islands, U.s. Wallis and Futuna Western Sahara Yemen Zambia Zimbabwe Go How often would you like to donate? Just Once Give Monthly Donation amount (EUR) €2.50 €5 €10 €20 €30 €50 €100 Other Please select an amount (minimum $1) We cannot accept donations greater than USD $4 ($1 $2) through our website. Please contact our major gifts staff at $3. Donate by credit/debit card Visa MasterCard American Express JCB Discover PayPal Apple Pay Google Pay Donate by bank transfer (SEPA) Can we stay in touch? Yes. Send me emails with ways that I can support Wikipedia. No. Don't send me an occasional email with opportunities to support Wikipedia. Sorry to hear that. We don't email often; would you consider changing your mind? Thanks for changing your mind! We'll respect your inbox. Please select an email option The Wikimedia Foundation will send you email updates and tell you if Wikipedia needs your support or advice in the future. Your information is handled in accordance with our donor privacy policy . Each email you receive will include easy unsubscribe options. Where your donation goes Technology : Servers, bandwidth, maintenance, development. Wikipedia is one of the top 10 websites in the world, and it runs on a fraction of what other top websites spend. People and Projects : The other top websites have thousands of employees. Wikimedia Foundation has about 700 staff and contractors to support a wide variety of projects, making your donation a great investment in a highly-efficient not-for-profit organization. } /* --- Form --- */ #donate-form-wrapper fieldset { width: 100%; border: 0; margin: 0 0 8px 0; padding: 0; } .frequency-options ul, .amount-options ul { display: grid; margin: 0; padding: 0; list-style: none; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px; } .frequency-options ul { grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(0, 1fr)); } .amount-options ul { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr; } .frequency-options ul li, .amount-options ul li { padding: 0; } /* --- Subheaders --- */ #radiobuttons-table-header, #paymenttype-table-header { display: block; margin-bottom: 6px; text-align: center; font-weight: bold; } /* --- Commmon button styles --- */ .frequency-options input[type="radio"], .amount-options input[type="radio"] { position: absolute; width: 1px; height: 1px; margin: -1px; padding: 0; overflow: hidden; border: 0; clip: rect(0 0 0 0); } .frb-btn, .payment-method-button { display: flex; justify-content: center; align-content: center; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; text-align: center; height: 50px; padding: 0 2px; border-radius: 2px; font-family: inherit; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.2; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 100ms, color 100ms, border-color 100ms, box-shadow 100ms; background-color: #f8f9fa; color: #222; border: 1px solid #a2a9b1; } .frb-btn:hover { background-color: #fff; color: #444; border-color: #a2a9b1; } .frb-btn:active { background-color: #c8ccd1; color: #000; border-color: #72777d; box-shadow: none; } input[type="radio"]:checked + .frb-btn { background-color: #2a4b8d; color: #fff; border-color: #2a4b8d; } .frb-btn:focus, .payment-method-button:focus { outline: 0; border-color: #36c; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px #36c; } input[type="radio"]:focus + .frb-btn, input[type="radio"]:checked + .frb-btn:focus { box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px #36c, inset 0 0 0 2px #fff; } .payment-method-button { color: #36c; } .payment-method-button:hover { background-color: #fff; border-color: #447ff5; } .payment-method-button:active { background-color: #eff3fa; color: #2a4b8d; border-color: #2a4b8d; box-shadow: none; } /* --- Donation Amounts --- */ .amount-options .frb-btn { height: 60px; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.2; text-align: center; } /* Smaller font size for countries with v long amounts */ .country-CO .amount-options .frb-btn, .country-CR .amount-options .frb-btn, .country-KR .amount-options .frb-btn, .country-PY .amount-options .frb-btn, .country-VN .amount-options .frb-btn { font-size: 13px; } .input_amount_other .frb-btn span { display: block; font-size: 12px; line-height: 1; margin-bottom: 2px; white-space: normal; text-align: center; } .input_amount_other input { display: block; width: 100%; border: 1px solid #a2a9b1; color: #222; padding: 2px; border-radius: 2px; direction: ltr; text-align: center; font-family: inherit; font-size: 16px; /* must be >=16px or mobile Safari zooms in when selected */ -webkit-appearance: none; -moz-appearance: none; appearance: none; margin: 0 4px; } /* --- Opt-in and PTF input styles --- */ .lp-radio-wrapper, .lp-checkbox-wrapper { display: table; } .lp-radio, .lp-checkbox { display: table-cell; vertical-align: top; margin: 7px 8px 8px 2px; cursor: pointer; } body.rtl .lp-radio, body.rtl .lp-checkbox { margin: 7px 2px 8px 8px; } .lp-radio-label, .lp-checkbox-label { display: table-cell; vertical-align: top; padding: 4px 0; white-space: normal; font-size: 14px; line-height: 18px; font-weight: normal; cursor: pointer; } .lp-radio-label:hover, .lp-radio:focus + .lp-radio-label, .lp-radio:hover + .lp-radio-label, .lp-checkbox-label:hover, .lp-checkbox:focus + .lp-checkbox-label, .lp-checkbox:hover + .lp-checkbox-label { color: #36c; text-decoration: none; } /* --- Opt-in --- */ .optin-options legend { padding: 0; font-size: inherit; font-weight: bold; } .optin-options ul { list-style: none; margin: 0; } .optin-options li { display: table; } .optin-smallprint { clear: both; font-size: 12px; line-height: 14px; margin-top: 8px; } .optin-no-prompt { display: none; margin: 0; padding: 6px; border: 2px solid #900; border-radius: 2px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 18px; font-weight: normal; } .optin-no-prompt.is-positive { border-color: #14866d; font-weight: bold; } .optin-no-prompt__yes { display: none; } .optin-no-prompt__no { display: block; } .optin-no-prompt.is-positive .optin-no-prompt__yes { display: block; } .optin-no-prompt.is-positive .optin-no-prompt__no { display: none; } /* --- PTF --- */ .ptf { display: none; } /* --- Payment method buttons --- */ .payment-method-div { padding: 4px 0; } /* Hide extra empty

tags between buttons */ .payment-method-div ~ p { display: none; } .payment-method-button { margin: 0; width: 100%; font-size: 16px; -webkit-appearance: none; -moz-appearance: none; appearance: none; overflow: hidden; } /* --- Infobox ("Where your donation goes") --- */ #infobox-wrapper { font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.4; color: #54595d; font-weight: normal; margin-top: 8px } #infobox-wrapper .mw-heading2 { font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; color: inherit; border: 0; margin-bottom: 8px; } /* --- Privacy and links --- */ #donate-footer { width: 100%; max-width: 948px; margin: 24px auto; text-align: left; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.4; color: #54595d; } #donate-footer > div { margin-bottom: 1em; } .form-info-links, .form-info-links ul { list-style: none; margin: 0; text-align: center; font-size: 15px; } .form-info-links li { display: inline-block; } .form-info-links a.external { padding: 14px !important; } /* --- Footer --- */ .mw-footer { display: none; } .payment-method-button svg { margin: 0 4px; } /* Credit card logos. * Classes are added by https://donate.wikimedia.org/wiki/MediaWiki:DonationForm.js --- */ .paymentmethod-cc svg { display: none; height: 26px; border: 1px solid #c8ccd1; border-radius: 4px; } .cctypes-vmad, .cctypes-vmaj, .cctypes-vmj, .cctypes-vma, .cctypes-vm, .cctypes-CBvma, .cctypes-vmar { font-size: 0; /* Remove spacing between icons */ } .cctypes-vmad .cc-logo-visa, .cctypes-vmad .cc-logo-mastercard, .cctypes-vmad .cc-logo-amex, .cctypes-vmad .cc-logo-discover, .cctypes-vmaj .cc-logo-visa, .cctypes-vmaj .cc-logo-mastercard, .cctypes-vmaj .cc-logo-amex, .cctypes-vmaj .cc-logo-jcb, .cctypes-vmj .cc-logo-visa, .cctypes-vmj .cc-logo-mastercard, .cctypes-vmj .cc-logo-jcb, .cctypes-vma .cc-logo-visa, .cctypes-vma .cc-logo-mastercard, .cctypes-vma .cc-logo-amex, .cctypes-vm .cc-logo-visa, .cctypes-vm .cc-logo-mastercard, .cctypes-CBvma .cc-logo-CB, .cctypes-CBvma .cc-logo-visa, .cctypes-CBvma .cc-logo-mastercard, .cctypes-CBvma .cc-logo-amex, .cctypes-vmar .cc-logo-visa, .cctypes-vmar .cc-logo-mastercard, .cctypes-vmar .cc-logo-amex, .cctypes-vmar .cc-logo-rupay { display: inline-block !important; } .paymentmethod-cc .cc-logo-rupay { border: 0; } /* Logos - WP on top, WMF horizontal below */ #p-logo a { /* Need explicit height for backgrounds for IE */ background: top 30% center/160px 24px url(https://donate.wikimedia.org/static/images/mobile/copyright/wikipedia-wordmark-en.svg), top 70% center/160px 37px url(https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/donate/6/60/Wmf_logo_horiz_K.svg); background-repeat: no-repeat; margin-left: 8px; } /* Mobile styles */ @media (max-width: 981px) { /* Text & Logo layout */ #content { margin: 0; padding: 140px 24px 24px 24px; } #mw-panel, #p-logo, #p-logo a { width: 100% !important; height: 140px; margin: 0; } #p-logo a { margin-left: 0; } /* Hide appeal */ #appeal-wrapper { display: none; } #form-wrapper { padding: 16px; } /* Footer */ div#footer { margin: 0; } } @media (max-width: 721px) { /* Stack appeal and form */ #appeal-wrapper { flex-basis: 100%; padding: 0; } } @media (max-width: 501px) { /* Appeal same width as form */ #appeal-wrapper { max-width: 380px; padding: 0; } #content { padding: 140px 8px 8px 8px; } #donate-footer { max-width: 380px; } } #country-confirm { text-align: center; margin-top: -12px; padding: 4px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #a2a9b1; margin-bottom: 8px; font-size: 90%; } @media (min-width: 980px) { #country-confirm { margin-top: -18px; title: Make your donation now - Wikimedia Foundation
content:
Make your donation now Jump to navigation Jump to search Wikipedia still can't be sold. Thank you for considering a donation to the Wikimedia Foundation. We invite you to reflect on the number of times you visited Wikipedia in the last year. If the knowledge you gained here was valuable, please join the 2% of readers who donate. Any amount helps: €5, €20, €50 , or whatever feels right to you today. In the age of AI, access to verifiable facts is crucial. Wikipedia is at the heart of online information, powering everything from your personal searches to emerging AI technologies. Your gift strengthens the knowledge of today and tomorrow. If Wikipedia has given you useful knowledge this year, please give back. There are no small contributions: every edit counts, every donation counts. Thank you. It appears that you do not have JavaScript enabled, or your browser does not support it. In order to provide a safe, secure and pleasant experience, our donation form requires JavaScript. #actual-form-loading { display: none; } Loading… (If the form does not load, your web browser may not be supported. Please try a different browser.) Just Once Give Monthly Donation amount (EUR) €2.50 €5 €10 €20 €30 €50 €100 Other Please select an amount (minimum $1) We cannot accept donations greater than USD $4 ($1 $2) through our website. Please contact our major gifts staff at $3. Donate by credit/debit card Visa MasterCard American Express JCB Discover PayPal Apple Pay Google Pay Donate by bank transfer (SEPA) Can we stay in touch? Yes. Send me emails with ways that I can support Wikipedia. No. Don't send me an occasional email with opportunities to support Wikipedia. Sorry to hear that. We don't email often; would you consider changing your mind? Thanks for changing your mind! We'll respect your inbox. Please select an email option The Wikimedia Foundation will send you email updates and tell you if Wikipedia needs your support or advice in the future. Your information is handled in accordance with our donor privacy policy . Each email you receive will include easy unsubscribe options. Where your donation goes Technology : Servers, bandwidth, maintenance, development. Wikipedia is one of the top 10 websites in the world, and it runs on a fraction of what other top websites spend. People and Projects : The other top websites have thousands of employees. Wikimedia Foundation has about 700 staff and contractors to support a wide variety of projects, making your donation a great investment in a highly-efficient not-for-profit organization.
